'''Shrupak''' was the most sacred [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] temple on [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]], and was defended by the legendary Kaleesh warriors [[Grievous/Legends|Qymaen jai Sheelal]] and [[Ronderu lij Kummar]] when it was [[Assault on Shrupak|assaulted]] by [[Yam'rii/Legends|Yam'rii]] invaders during the [[Huk War]]. It was located at the gateway to the [[Ausez Steppes]].<ref name="tea">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The name "Shrupak" comes from [[Wikipedia:Shuruppak|Shuruppak]], an ancient [[Wikipedia:Sumer|Sumerian]] city.<ref name="Pena">
{{JCFCite|url=posts/23197092|board=Literature|thread="Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous" & "Lord of War" by Abel & Joe (SWI #86)|user=[[Abel G. Peña]]|date=2006-02-17|time=10:49 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20170728202846/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/unknown-soldier-the-story-of-general-grievous-lord-of-war-by-abel-joe-swi-86.21238198/page-31}}</ref> The design of the temple is reminiscent of a Sumerian [[Wikipedia:Ziggurat|ziggurat]].
